title: Wild Mushroom Fajitas
description: Savor the flavors of Mexico with this hearty and flavorful fajita recipe, featuring wild mushrooms, marinated in a zesty mixture of croatian spices and stir-fried to perfection.

ingredients.name: fry
ingredients.notes: serves as method, not an ingredient

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper (if using) to the skillet and sauté for 3-4 minutes.
Add the wild mushrooms to the skillet and sauté for an additional 4-5 minutes, or until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the Mexican seasoning blend to the skillet and stir to combine.
Warm the whole wheat tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the fajitas by placing a portion of the mushroom mixture onto a warmed tortilla and serving with your choice of toppings.
Optional: sprinkle a pinch of crystalline sugar on top of the fajitas for added sweetness.
